name: Evil Mountains
short_description: Evil mountains is an open world survival game that combines aliens, horror, crafting, base building and tower defence. The game takes place at a remote place somewhere in the Himalayan mountains. Here you'll discover that aliens are real, and you are their prey
detailed_description:
Embark on a terrifying adventure in the Himalayan mountains where you play the role of a private detective who's mission is to find a girl that has gone missing after joining an alien-worshipping cult. After your flight crashes you wake up somewhere deep in the mountains of Himalaya and apparently you seem to have been the only one who survived. At first glimpse it seems like you are completely alone there, but soon you will discover that's far from the case. Your first mission will be to try to survive the best you can. You have to manage hunger and thirst, making sure you won't catch a disease, keep warm and build a shelter, tools and eventually construct your own home and make yourself settled since you will soon realize to escape from this place will be far from a walk in the park. Hunt, fish, collect berries, mushrooms and plants to feed yourself. Craft tools and weapons, armor, clothes, workbenches, shelter and sturdy buildings. Progress with attributes and perks, advance in cooking and crafting, craft more advanced items and tools, loot and explore and get yourself prepared, really prepared, to fight off both the wildlife and the mysterious evil that has infestated this God forsaken place. Will you ever manage to escape the evil mountains? Will you find the missing girl? But perhaps most importantly, will you survive?

Features

  • Alien creatures

- Several different alien-like enemy types with different behaviours. They can be found in world and can jump up on you when you least expect it. They can also come in hordes and attack your base. No plain-old brain dead zombies here!

  • A large open world

- Approx. 12 sqkm. Deep forests, caves with deeply hidden secrets, large meadows, lakes, rivers, snowy mountains, houses and villages with plenty of interesting things to find.

  • Hunger and thirst-management

  • Diseases

- Cold, flu, pneumonia, stomach illness, bleeding, anemia, infected wound, sepsis.

  • Crafting

- A wide range of items, weapons, tools, workbenches, forges, armor, traps. All items can be salvaged into its components.

  • Base building

- Ranging from simple shelters to buildings constructed piece by piece. You can also upgrade the buildables and preferably surround them with defences since the enemies can tear them down.

  • Tower defence

    - The enemies will attack your base and might come alone or in hordes. The more you play, the tougher the attacks will be.

  • Cooking

- Several basic and advanced meals as well as medicines and different types of enhancing drugs.

  • Farming

- Plant crops by harvesting seeds from plants, vegetables and fruits.

  • Horses/Mountable horses

- Riding a horse is a great way of traveling over large distances.

  • Buffs of different kinds

- From food and drinks as well as from making sure you get enough rest and keeping your comfort level high.

  • Skill system

- A rewarding skill system with attributes and perks to enhance your abilities as well as specialize in different areas.

  • A rich flora and fauna

- Several different plants, trees, bushes, minerals, animals and fishes ready to be picked up, harvested, cut downed, mined, hunted and fished or catched with a trap.

  • Moveable items and structures

- Everything can be moved and placed, all items, structures and buildings.

  • Animated workbenches

- Several of the workbenches are animated for a more immersive feeling.

  • UFOs

- What would an alien-themed game be without UFOs/UAPs? They pose a threath both for you and your buildings.

  • Detailed player stats

- To Keep track of your state.

  • Dynamic weather and day/night-cycle

  • Vehicles

*** Update notice 2024-01-07 ***

- Farming and a new enemy: "Fatman"

*** Update notice 2024-01-13 ***

- Loot-sorting, Marker for dropped loot on death, Keyboard shortcuts in inventory, A new Swamp area, Finetuned some sounds

*** Update notice 2024-01-15 ***

- Added a map and a new enemy: "The Shroom"

*** Update notice 2024-01-21

- Added horses and horse riding

*** Update notice 2024-11-03

Added lots of new stuff, some of them are:

  • Dynamite trap

  • Molotov trap

  • Spikewall trap

  • Wall torch

  • Generator

  • Log sled

  • Drying rack

  • Warmsuit

  • New foods and buffs
